notes: Chunks 36+37+38+Blog Day 10 complete 2026-06-07. Chunk 36 (Template A, Field Manual, Tier B): 3 routes - sri-lanka-to-uk, ethiopia-to-uk, finland-to-uk. UK APHA Listed/Unlisted rules, tapeworm, titre test. Chunk 37 (Template B, Visual Journey): 25 country-to-US routes - CDC high-risk (bangladesh, pakistan, colombia, peru, morocco, ghana, nepal, sri-lanka, ethiopia, cambodia, myanmar) and non-high-risk (chile, finland, austria, belgium, greece, bulgaria, croatia, cyprus, hungary, romania, slovakia, luxembourg, malta, mauritius). Chunk 38 (Template C, Comparison Brief): 25 cross-regional routes - brazil-to-thailand/denmark/greece/india/indonesia/malaysia/mexico/philippines (7 pre-existing) + brazil-to-thailand, denmark-to-brazil/mexico, greece-to-brazil/india/indonesia/malaysia/mexico/south-korea, india-to-brazil/denmark/greece/indonesia/mexico, indonesia-to-brazil/greece/india/malaysia (18 new this session). Blog Day 10: pet-transport-uae-to-pakistan.md (2000 words, Marcus Webb). UAE-Pakistan: MOCCAE cert, AQD NOC, Emirates/Flydubai/PIA to KHI/LHE/ISB. Next chunk 39 (Template D, Conversational Q&A, Tier B). Blog Day 11 next.

counts.note: total_site_pages counts content .md source files. The full deployed total (including Hugo taxonomy and list pages) is verified from sitemap.xml after a build.

counts_method: Reconciled from disk by verify_build_state.py. Never hand-edit count fields; run 'python verify_build_state.py --write' instead.
